compile_shader_zero_copy._note: Phase 4 compile_shader fast-path: ON=TRITON_MSL_COMPILE_SHADER=1 (default), OFF=0. Measured 2026-06-14 on M4 Max (peak 546 GB/s). Reduction is pass-1 scatter-sum (each block→OUT[pid]), not global atomic.

flash_attention_simdgroup_fp32.name: flash_attention_simdgroup_fp32
flash_attention_simdgroup_fp32._note: MEASURED on M4 Max via an integration microbenchmark of the shipped make_flash_attention_kernel_simdgroup (loop-split kernel; warmup + median over 50 iters). NOT yet a committed hw_harness regression benchmark. Correctness verified by the 16-case differential gate (simd==scalar==torch). Throughput scales with N_CTX. NOT competitive with Apple metal-flash-attention / MLX in absolute terms.

flash_attention_simdgroup_fp16.name: flash_attention_simdgroup_fp16
flash_attention_simdgroup_fp16._note: MEASURED on M4 Max via an integration microbenchmark of the shipped make_flash_attention_kernel_simdgroup (loop-split kernel; warmup + median over 50 iters). NOT yet a committed hw_harness regression benchmark. Correctness verified by the 16-case differential gate (simd==scalar==torch). Throughput scales with N_CTX. NOT competitive with Apple metal-flash-attention / MLX in absolute terms.

matmul_fast_path_unaligned_M._note: Deterministic, occupancy-gated tile selection extends the fast simdgroup matmul to UNALIGNED M (TRITON_MSL_MATMUL_AUTOTUNE=1, default; =0 pins fixed (4,4)). NOT a GPU-timed autotuner (the earlier timed/disk-cached version measured within-noise AND introduced an N-contract silent-wrong; removed). The fixed (4,4) needs M%32==0, so M%32!=0 drops to the ~2.4 TFLOP/s generic path; a smaller tile (rr=2 tile_m=16 for M%16, rr=1 tile_m=8 for M%8) keeps LARGE unaligned-M matmuls on the fast path. Occupancy gate (n_groups >= 8*cores) so only enough-parallelism shapes use the fine tile; below it -> generic (never-regress). All configs provably correct (selection is perf-only). Measured 2026-06-20, M4 Max, @triton.jit fp32 (BM=BN=BK=32) through production dispatch_fast_matmul, ON vs OFF, 20 reps median.
matmul_fast_path_unaligned_M.occupancy_gate: n_groups >= 8 * gpu_core_count (conservative; measured fast>generic crossover is noisy)

matmul_2048_bf16.name: matmul_2048_bf16
matmul_2048_bf16._note: bf16 in / fp32 out via simdgroup_bfloat8x8 (M-series bfloat matrix unit, float32 accumulate). Was the ~2.4 TF generic float-compute fallback; ~4.9x. Measured 2026-06-21 M4 Max, @triton.jit BM=BN=BK=32, 30 reps median.

matmul_2048_bf16out.name: matmul_2048_bf16out
matmul_2048_bf16out._note: bf16 in / bf16 out (cast epilogue). Measured 2026-06-21 M4 Max.
